title: Rich Silky Greek Lamb Gigantes Plaki
description: A savory and silky Greek dish featuring lamb, perfect for a brunch mood, with a shojin-friendly approach and gigantes plaki form.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Rinse the gigantes beans and soak them in water for at least 8 hours.
In a large Dutch oven, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the lamb shoulder and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the tomato paste, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the soaked gigantes beans and enough water to cover the ingredients, and bring to a boil.
Cover the Dutch oven and transfer it to the preheated oven, and cook for 2 hours.
Remove the Dutch oven from the oven and let it cool slightly, then serve hot.
